HGSS.491.0000:
I want to buy some items that raise
Pokémon stats, but I don’t have\r
enough money...
HGSS.491.0001:
Do you know PP UP?\f
It raises the Max PP of moves.\f
I thought I would find it here,
but they say you can’t buy it...\r
Rats!
HGSS.491.0002:
Using items on them makes
Pokémon happy.\r
They hate certain items, though...
HGSS.491.0003:
Bring Out Pokémon Potential
5F: Battle Collection
